summary: A Go-based test runner and MCP handler system heavily augmented by AI agent-generated test suites.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated/agent-produced extra tests (0005-0025) cluttering the repository
Frequent merge conflicts in session metadata indicating parallel agent workflows
Potential test flakiness from heavily mocked assertion wiring tests
suggestions: Archive or consolidate the numerous GOrchestra agent test directories into a single comprehensive test suite
Implement stricter branch/merge policies for agent-generated code to reduce metadata conflicts
Focus on stabilizing the core runner and MCP handler logic before expanding test coverage
